scripts.test: node -c coinbase-advanced.js && node -c portfolio.js && node -c agent-trader.js && npm run worm:check && node portfolio.js --help >/dev/null && node agent-trader.js --help >/dev/null
scripts.test:all: node -c coinbase-advanced.js && node -c portfolio.js && node -c agent-trader.js && npm run worm:check && npm run test:safety && npm run test:quant
scripts.worm:check: node --check robinhood-worm.js && node --check src/worm/index.mjs && node --check src/worm/api/coinbase-adapter.mjs && node --check src/worm/engine/trading-engine.mjs
